name: odookit
description: OdooKit — Playwright-based Odoo automation and verification toolkit

scripts.test:smoke: ADMIN_LOGIN=${ADMIN_LOGIN:-admin} ADMIN_PASSWORD=${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin} npx playwright test --project=local tests/smoke/
scripts.setup:local:
ADMIN_LOGIN=${ADMIN_LOGIN:-admin} ADMIN_PASSWORD=${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin} docker compose up -d --wait && ADMIN_LOGIN=${ADMIN_LOGIN:-admin} ADMIN_PASSWORD=${ADMIN_PASSWORD:-admin} npx playwright test --project=local tests/setup/ && node -e "console.log('
--- UAT READY ---
Odoo: ' + (process.env.LOCAL_ODOO_URL || 'http://localhost:8069') + '
Admin: ' + (process.env.ADMIN_LOGIN || 'admin') + '
Modules: CRM, Project installed
Test user: ' + (process.env.TEST_USER_LOGIN || 'not configured') + '

To tear down: npm run teardown:local')"
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:ui && npm run audit:headers && npm run audit:infra
